title: How Marigolds Came Yellow.
content:
Jealous girls these sometimes were,
    While they liv'd or lasted here:
    Turn'd to flowers, still they be
    Yellow, mark'd for jealousy.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "How Marigolds Came Yellow."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
